title: Alle Tage ist kein Sonntag
writer: Kurt Heuser, Werner E. Hintz, Volodja Semitjov
actors: Elisabeth Müller, Paul Hubschmid, Dietmar Schönherr
plot: While Eva is in the hospital after an accident, her son, Peter, goes in search of his long-missing father. Learning he has died, Peter then prepares himself for the new man in his mother's life.
